# programs.nnn

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.nnn`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.nnn.bookmarks` | `attribute set of string` | Directory bookmarks. |
| `programs.nnn.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable nnn. |
| `programs.nnn.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash integration. |
| `programs.nnn.enableFishIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fish integration. |
| `programs.nnn.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zsh integration. |
| `programs.nnn.extraPackages` | `list of package` | Extra packages available to nnn. |
| `programs.nnn.options` | `(list of string) or (attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string)) convertible to it` | Configuration options for {command}`nnn`. See {command}`nnn -h` |
| `programs.nnn.package` | `package` | The nnn package to use. |
| `programs.nnn.plugins` | `submodule` | Manage nnn plugins. |
| `programs.nnn.plugins.mappings` | `attribute set of string` | Key mappings to the plugins. |
| `programs.nnn.plugins.src` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the plugin folder. |
| `programs.nnn.quitcd` | `boolean` | Whether to enable cd on quit. |
